description_long: This is an adult human figure with a slender build, standing upright with both arms raised high above the head in a V-shape. The person is dressed in a sleeveless, fitted top and straight-cut pants, paired with closed-toe shoes. The figure's hair is medium-length and styled to fall just above the shoulders, parted in the middle. The facial features are neutral, and the body posture suggests a gesture of stretching or signaling. The clothing fits closely to the body, and there are no visible accessories or carried objects. The overall appearance is casual and suitable for an urban pedestrian.
description: An adult standing upright with arms raised in a V-shape, wearing a sleeveless top, straight pants, and closed shoes. The figure has medium-length hair and a casual urban appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the person's face, sleeveless top, and both arms raised in a V-shape.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the arm extended upward, and the straight fit of the pants.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, the top, and both arms raised, with the back of the pants and shoes visible.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, the arm extended upward, and the side contour of the clothing.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless fitted top and straight-cut pants
attribute_posture: standing upright with both arms raised overhead
attribute_hairstyle: medium-length straight hair parted in the middle
